title: docs: replace legacy remote Zephyr build guidance with AWS EC2
description: User requested removing the old SSH-host remote build guidance from AGENTS.md and Beads persistent memories, and using AWS EC2 instead for remote/Linux-only Zephyr builds. Scope: update AGENTS.md to direct agents to AWS EC2 when local builds cannot run; update Beads memories so no persistent memory recommends the old SSH host; verify with searches in AGENTS.md and Beads memories.
close_reason: Removed legacy SSH-host remote build guidance from AGENTS.md and replaced it with direct AWS EC2 guidance for Linux-only Zephyr builds. Updated Beads memory zephyr-builds-ec2 to say Linux-only Zephyr builds/tests should use AWS EC2 when local macOS cannot run them. Verified bd memories query and repository Beads exports have no remaining old-host references; git diff --check passed.
